name: Sacramento City Unified School District
about: Sacramento City Unified School District serves approximately 42,000 students across 80 schools in California's state capital. The district is one of the most diverse in Northern California, reflecting the multicultural fabric of Sacramento.
calendarNotes: Sacramento City Unified typically starts the school year in mid-August, consistent with most Northern California districts. Spring Break usually falls in late March or early April. As California's state capital, Sacramento has a large population of government workers and state employees whose schedules often align with legislative sessions — the district calendar does not directly reflect legislative cycles, but Spring Break timing is useful for families planning trips during legislative recesses. The district is one of Northern California's most diverse, with a large share of families who speak languages other than English at home. Families relocating from the Bay Area should note that SCUSD's calendar may start and end a week or two earlier than many Bay Area districts.
